case_title: MCVEY USTANO VS JOHNSON CELESTE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MCVEY USTANO AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON CELESTE CHUNG KI SOON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
